Following his recovery, Castle becomes a heavily armed vigilante who will stop at nothing to exact revenge on Saint and dismantle his underworld empire.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: Frank Castle, aka The Punisher (Ray Stevenson), turns the streets of New York City red as he wages a one man war against the crime syndicate responsible for the death of his wife and two kids. Aided by his trusted sidekick, Microchip (Wayne Knight), he almost kills Billy Russoti (Dominic West) and leaves him horribly disfigured. Billy renames himself Jigsaw and with the help of his crazed brother Loony Bin Jim, recruits criminals from every corner of the city to do battle with Frank.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: Using his love for comics as inspiration, teenager Dave Lizewski (Aaron Johnson) decides to reinvent himself as a superhero -- despite a complete lack of special powers. Dave dons a costume, dubs himself "Kick-Ass," and gets to work fighting crime. He joins forces with the father/daughter vigilante team of Big Daddy and Hit Girl, then befriends another fledgling crime-fighter called Red Mist (Christopher Mintz-Plasse), but a scheming mobster soon puts their alliance to the test.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: In the vein of BATMAN BEGINS and SIN CITY, THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: Tintin and his friends discover directions to a sunken ship commanded by Capt. Haddock's ancestor and go off on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) and his new girlfriend, Carly (Rosie Huntington-Whiteley), join the fray when the evil Decepticons renew their longstanding war against the Autobots. Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) believes that resurrecting ancient Transformer Sentinel Prime (Leonard Nimoy), once the leader of the Autobots, may lead to victory. That decision, however, has devastating consequences the war appears to tip in favor of the Decepticons, leading to a climactic battle in Chicago.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After an epic battle, a great city lies in ruins, but the Earth itself is saved. As humanity begins to pick up the pieces, a shadowy group emerges to try to take control of history. Meanwhile, an ancient and powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth. A new group of humans, led by Cade Yeager (Mark Wahlberg), helps Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) and the Autobots rise up to meet their most fearsome challenge yet: a worldwide war of good versus evil.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Held Up
programme.desc: A bored bank teller's life changes dramatically when two teams of crazy robbers hold up his branch.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: A Rolling Stone reporter (John Travolta) seduces an aerobics instructor (Jamie Lee Curtis) while doing a story on health clubs for singles.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Mac Traven (Tom Selleck) is a Civil War veteran who fought for the North, while his brother, Dal (Sam Elliott), was allied with the South. In spite of this considerable point of contention, the siblings must work together when they find that other family members have been abducted, along with Dal's girlfriend, Kate (Katharine Ross). Joined by their trouble-making uncle "Black Jack" (Ben Johnson), Mac and Dal relentlessly pursue the criminals to rescue their relatives.

programme.title: Desperate Measures
programme.desc: Widowed cop Frank Conner (Andy Garcia) is determined to secure a bone marrow transplant for his son, Matt (Joseph Cross), who will die of leukemia if a suitable donor isn't found. Conner discovers that incarcerated serial murderer Peter McCabe (Michael Keaton) is a match for Matt, and the psychopath eventually agrees to donate marrow, but he escapes from the operating room just before the procedure. Conner quickly follows, but the scheming McCabe won't be easily apprehended.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Edwin O'Connor, this political drama focuses on Frank Skeffington (Spencer Tracy), an aging mayor who is embarking on his final campaign for reelection. Aided by his nephew, Adam Caulfield (Jeffrey Hunter), and savvy strategist John Gorman (Pat O'Brien), Skeffington faces considerable challenges as the political landscape that he knows slowly crumbles away, but, undaunted, he remains determined to stay in the game a bit longer.

programme.title: The Ambushers
programme.desc: A secret agent (Dean Martin) saves a flying-saucer prototype and its pilot (Janice Rule) in the third of four Matt Helm movies.

programme.title: No Sad Songs for Me
programme.desc: Upon being diagnosed with terminal cancer, selfless suburban housewife Mary Scott (Margaret Sullavan) makes the ultimate sacrifice: she decides to keep the unpleasant news from her husband, Brad (Wendell Corey), and daughter, Polly, to avoid devastating her loved ones. Instead, Mary encourages Brad's affair with a co-worker (Viveca Lindfors), and even grooms the other woman to take her place. But as Mary's illness progresses, keeping it a secret presents a considerable challenge.

programme.title: You Can't Run Away From It
programme.desc: Furious over the elopement of his daughter, Ellie (June Allyson), with a fortune hunter, millionaire A.A. Andrews (Charles Bickford) has her kidnapped and sequestered on his yacht. Ellie defies her father by escaping and taking a bus to meet her husband, only to lose all her money to a thief. After Ellie accidentally allows the bus to leave without her, she is befriended by fellow passenger Peter Warne (Jack Lemmon), an unemployed reporter who knows her identity and is primed for a scoop.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman doesn't realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.title: Same Kind of Different as Me
programme.desc: From The NY Times bestseller comes an inspirational true story about two men from drastically different backgrounds, who develop a surprising bond that will lead them on the most remarkable journey of their lives and forge an everlasting friendship.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Movie
programme.desc: Dr. Clayton Forrester (Trace Beaulieu) figures he can rule the world if he deadens his subjects' brains by making them endure terrible movies. Exploiting his access to nearby satellite-dwellers Mike Nelson (Michael J. Nelson) and his robot pals, Crow T. Robot and Tom Servo (Kevin Murphy), Forrester makes them watch a cheesy 1950s spaceship film. But when Mike and friends make funny comments throughout the movie and others that follow it, Forrester's plan looks increasingly flimsy.

programme.title: Gold Diggers: The Secret of Bear Mountain
programme.desc: Beth (Christina Ricci) is a city mouse who's just arrived in the country. When her family relocates to a leafy area in the state of Washington, Beth starts hanging out with outsider Jody (Anna Chlumsky), who is constantly regaling Beth with a local legend about a woman named Molly Morgan (Amy Kirk) that supposedly hid a treasure somewhere on nearby Bear Mountain. When the girls decide to tackle Bear Mountain together, Beth learns about the not-so-happy situation Jody is dealing with at home.

programme.title: Resurrection
programme.desc: Edna (Ellen Burstyn) has a near-death experience when she and her husband drive off a cliff. Widowed and paralyzed, Edna returns to Kansas with her grandparents, noticing the curious effect her touch has on a girl's bleeding nose along the way. Her gift for healing people attracts the attention of a small-town community, including a young man (Sam Shepard) who becomes her lover. An agnostic herself despite her powers, Edna finds her lover has a dangerous obsession with religion.

programme.title: Cross My Heart
programme.desc: A teenage girl and her friends help to hide a German deserter in the basement until the end of the war.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: The PA and the Manhattan Prince
programme.desc: PA Lucy ends up falling for her new employer, a prince who is planning a special ball.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy Deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles.

programme.title: Cowboy & Indiana
programme.desc: With new found hope, former world champion bull rider is given a dangerous shot to regain his former glory.

programme.title: Fortune Salon
programme.desc: Tae-rang is a successful upscale clairvoyant with not only gifted shamanistic talent, but also good looks. Yet fate has it that she is destined to marry Seung-won, the most unattractive and lazy man she has ever met.

programme.title: Iris: New Generation
programme.desc: During peace talks, a North Korean diplomat is killed, sparking a hunt as NSS faces moles and terrorism.

programme.title: Lady Daddy
programme.desc: Photographer Ji-hyun's life turns upside down when a boy claims she is his father, unraveling her hidden past.

programme.title: The Age Of Blood
programme.desc: A battle between traitors conspiring coup d'etat and Joseon's greatest swordsman has begun! Kim Ho, Korea's greatest swordsman, gets demoted from the royal palace guard to a prison officer. One day, during a chaotic riot in the prison, five armed men try to break free Lee In-jwa, who's been imprisoned for a conspiracy against the king. Kim Ho realizes that he alone can save the king in the palace where most of king's people have turned.

programme.title: Raven
programme.desc: Raven must decide to either give her abusive husband a second chance or stay with her new boyfriend after finding out she's pregnant with his child.

programme.title: Love and Deceit
programme.desc: A young woman thought she married the perfect man but soon finds out that he is not who she thought he was... Things are not always what they seem.

programme.title: Envision
programme.desc: Thomas had the perfect life until he lost his wife and son. After a ground-breaking surgery he is given an implant that allows him to create his own virtual reality. When the implant malfunctions, Thomas discovers a dark, long-forgotten secret.

programme.title: Bruthas 321
programme.desc: Three brothers born on the same day, at the same hospital, three minutes apart, meet for the first time 34 years later. All three learn they have a lot more in common besides the same deadbeat father.

programme.title: Texas Cyclone
programme.desc: A wandering cowpoke is shocked when the inhabitants of a Western community treat him like a long-lost friend.

programme.title: Relentless
programme.desc: Framed for a murder he didn't commit, a cowboy hides with a traveling woman as he flees a sheriff and hunts for the real killer.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: In Texas, gunfighter Brazos Kane (Randolph Scott) decides to lay down his guns for good and rides out to visit his best friend -- only to witness his murder. When Brazos takes the body to the nearby ranch of the powerful Banner (Griff Barnett), the rancher accuses him of the murder. Brazos leaves Banner's daughter, Bess (Barbara Britton), a vital piece of evidence in the crime, and then must evade Banner and a crooked sheriff as he reluctantly takes up arms to prove his innocence.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: Dan Evans (Van Heflin), a drought-plagued Arizona rancher, volunteers to take captured stagecoach robber and murderer Ben Wade (Glenn Ford) from Bisbee to Contention City, where the criminal will be put aboard the 3:10 train to Yuma for his trial. Accompanied only by the town drunk, Alex Potter (Henry Jones), Dan battles Wade's henchman (Richard Jaeckel), the murder victim's revenge-minded brother, and the temptation of the large bribe Wade offers in exchange for his freedom.

programme.title: Flame Of Barbary Coast
programme.desc: A cowboy competes with a gambling tycoon on the Barbary Coast for the hand of a beautiful dance-hall queen.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando's only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: Djurado
programme.desc: Djurado is a gun-slinging professional gambler who struts into the small town of Silver Mine. He wins half of the local saloon, the other part of which belongs to Barbara, while battling notorious outlaw Tucan.

programme.title: Buckaroo: The Winchester Does Not Forgive
programme.desc: After Lash's men murder his new boss, Al begins gathering men in an attempt to take them on and get revenge for their cowardly act.

programme.title: Bad Man's River
programme.desc: An outlaw and two con men attempt to relieve the Mexican government of $1 million. Once the scam is completed, they have to avoid the attentions of, amongst others, the Mexican army and Billy the Kid - all of whom are eager to claim the cash for themselves.

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: In the American West, Willet Gashade (Warren Oates), a former bounty hunter, and Coley Boyard (Will Hutchins), his dimwitted partner, are approached by a secretive young woman (Millie Perkins) who offers them money to guide her through the desert but refuses to discuss why she is traveling. The group embarks on the journey and is eventually joined by Billy Spear (Jack Nicholson), a volatile gunslinger the woman has also hired. The only question is why.

programme.title: Cjamango
programme.desc: A cowboy wins a sack of gold in a poker game only to have it stolen by two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men, until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas' is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. On board is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: In the Wild West, the Rawhide way station becomes the center of a hostage situation when four murderous fugitives (Hugh Marlowe, Dean Jagger, Jack Elam, George Tobias) take it over in a heist scheme. After killing the stationmaster (Tyrone Power), the criminals keep the only other employee, Sam Todd (Edgar Buchanan), alive to avoid outside suspicion by maintaining a front of normalcy. But Todd and the other hostages, Vinnie Holt (Susan Hayward) and her young niece, plot to make an escape.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: An outlaw keeps his convict brother from going straight.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie (Gail Davis) has hopes of acquiring a prime piece of land in a newly opened territory. With Douglas Kennedy, James Griffith.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie (Gail Davis) becomes involved in a controversy between a teen (Carolyn Craig) and her overly possessive father (Ewing Mitchell).

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Annie (Gail Davis) and Lofty (Brad Johnson) try to discover the identity of a masked man known as the Robin Hood Kid (Tyler MacDuff).

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Hoppy investigates the mysterious deaths at the Last Chance Inn that are linked to one particular room.

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Ranchers are angry and suspicious when proceeds of a sale made by Hoppy wind up in the hands of a snake oil salesman.

programme.title: The Californians: Corpus Delicti
programme.desc: Matt faces a court battle when he tries to have a man convicted on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A beautiful girl is the prize as a gunsmith enters a battle of bullets - and wits - with a trickshot artist.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A salesman gets an unusual assignment: find the buyer of a custom-made silver piano.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An American couple becomes involved in Benito Juarez's revolt against Emperor Maximilian of Mexico.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A US Navy officer is assigned to chart the Missouri River, but he runs into some unexpected hostility.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A phony newspaper item sparks a gold rush.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Innocent John Studebaker's high hopes are quickly punctured when he loses his wagon and his savings.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Mystery shrouds a stage robbery when the alleged culprit is killed before he can be questioned.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Civil War loyalties are split when a group of Southern sympathizers wants to send gold to the Confederacy.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Trappers look for an escape when they're imprisoned by the Mexican governor of San Diego.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A horsewoman puts a dent in a circus owner's plans to hire another equestrienne.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Italian immigrants are potential victims of extortion by an organized crime group from the old country.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A white man who lives among Native tribes tries to foil a plot to steal gold claims from their land.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: Panic strikes Jane Hammond (Natalie Portman) when her outlaw husband John returns to their farm with bullet wounds. Expecting the worst, she brings her young daughter to safety and travels to the home of Dan Frost (Joel Edgerton), a boozing ex-lover who may be her only hope. With Dan now on her side, Jane prepares for a showdown with the vengeful John Bishop and his gang of thugs. Looking to settle an old score, Bishop must now contend with the gun-toting Jane and her new partner.

programme.title: Western Jamboree
programme.desc: Under the soil of his ranch rests a priceless cache of helium, and foreman Gene Autry (Gene Autry) is trying to prevent villains from driving him and his crew off the property. The outlaws get rough with Gene and pal Frog Millhouse (Smiley Burnette), but Gene tries to put on a brave face for guests Betty Haskell (Jean Rouverol) and her fiancé. As Betty's engagement sours amid the upheaval on the ranch, she's soon taken with brave Gene. But he'll have to contend with the outlaws once and for all.

programme.title: In Old Monterey
programme.desc: Now an Army sergeant, Gene Autry (Gene Autry) is dispatched to persuade a number of landowners to sell their territory to the military for a new base. The ranchers are hesitant, and Gene discovers that the driving force behind their resistance is Stevenson (Jonathan Hale), a local mine owner trying to stir up trouble in hopes of scaring the military into offering a bigger paycheck for his land. As Stevenson incites tension between the ranchers and the Army, Gene tries to intervene.

programme.title: Blue Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Montana rancher Cyrus Higbee (Don Beddoe) asks his foreman, Gene Autry (Gene Autry), to travel with Rawhide Buttram (Pat Buttram) to Higbee Lodge in Canada, where he suspects his daughter, Sandy (Gail Davis), is disregarding his orders by starting a dude ranch and disrupting the logging industry. Higbee also regards Sandy's fiancé, Todd (Ross Ford), as insincere. When they arrive, Gene and Rawhide are set upon by vengeful mill workers and Sandy's mysterious foreman, Pop Phillips (Tom London).

programme.title: Down Mexico Way
programme.desc: Two alleged movie producers arrive in Sage City and claim that a film will be shot there. Promising to double investments, they collect $35,000 from the townspeople, then flee. Gene Autry (Gene Autry) and his friend Frog (Smiley Burnette) track the crooks to Mexico, where they learn a similar scam is targeting wealthy Don Carlos Alvarado (Julian Rivero) and his daughter, Maria (Fay McKenzie). Rushing to warn the Alvarados, the men meet the producers -- who are not the same men from Sage City.

programme.title: Guns and Guitars
programme.desc: Gene (Gene Autry) and his sidekick, Frog (Smiley Burnette), learn that a band of crooks is trying to illegally transport cattle carrying a contagious disease. Gene and Frog alert the sheriff of a nearby town, but the crooks then kill the lawman and try to pin the murder on Gene. Luckily, with the help of the dead man's daughter, Marjorie (Dorothy Dix), Gene clears his name and takes over as the new sheriff. He and Frog then set out to bring the outlaws to justice.

programme.title: Legends of the Pony Express
programme.desc: Heroic Pony Express riders and station keepers face deadly terrain, hostile Native Americans, and dangerous outlaws to deliver vital mail across the untamed frontier their life-and-death adventures unite the country and become the stuff of legends.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After a bank robbery, two Pinkerton detectives join forces to track the notorious Missouri Kid during a shootout, the Missouri Kid kills seasoned detective Charles Schumacher, leaving young George Dougherty to finish the job and avenge his death.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.sub-title: The Many Faces of Charles Siringo
programme.desc: Unable to apprehend the train-robbing Smith Brothers, Sheriff Doc Shores calls the Pinkerton National Detective Agency for assistance the agency sends Charles Siringo, an undercover specialist known for his unorthodox methods of capturing criminals.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier: Mason & Dixon: Trailblazing Surveyors
programme.desc: English astronomers Charles Mason and Jeremiah Dixon brave deadly terrain to resolve a border dispute in Colonial America and survey the Mason-Dixon Line with accuracy.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown: Lines in the Sand
programme.desc: The 13 remaining cowboys lock horns in a grueling series of challenges barrel racing, calf roping and colt starting with the help of expert judges, Trace Adkins decides which cowboy will be eliminated next.

programme.title: The Young Riders: The Initiation
programme.desc: Jesse must choose between family loyalty and his new friends when Hickok captures an outlaw who turns out to be Jesse's brother Frank.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: Confederate veteran John Chandler (Alan Ladd) returns from defeat in war to find his home razed, his wife dead and his young son, David (David Ladd), traumatized and rendered mute. Desperate to cure the boy, Chandler takes David to a small town in Illinois where he hopes to find a doctor. But, soon after the pair arrives, Chandler finds himself framed for assault -- and forced to choose between serving hard time and working for struggling local farmer Linnett Moore (Olivia de Havilland).

programme.title: Road Stories
programme.desc: Host Chuck Wicks sits down with Brett Young to discuss how he used Boyz II Men to get dates as a teenager meeting Boyz II Men, and the importance of knowing the stage.

programme.title: Road Stories
programme.desc: Chuck sits down with Jon Pardi to figure out the true meaning of a sausage party and why you should always be cautious of what a reporter will print.

programme.title: Road Stories
programme.desc: Host Chuck Wicks sits down with Mitchell Tenpenny and they discuss Mitchell's near death experience with a serial killer, his guitarist being too friendly at a biker bar, and he learns about Mitchell's death metal past.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Jon Pardi, Darius Rucker and Ashley McBryde
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.desc: The Grand Ole Opry House in Nashville, Tenn., is one of the premiere concert venues in the country and it's the site of this series of concerts featuring some of country music's top acts some of the stars who have performed on the Opry stage include Trace Adkins, Dierks Bentley, Martina McBride, Brad Paisley, LeAnn Rimes, Randy Travis and Carrie Underwood.

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.desc: Luke Combs, Charles Wesley Godwin and Mickey Guyton take the stage from the Opry House in Nashville, TN.

programme.sub-title: Post Malone Debut, Vince Gill, Lainey Wilson and Brad Paisley
programme.desc: Concerts from the Grand Ole Opry for country music fans.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Floods threaten the farm, and Paul is trapped by fallen power lines while the party lines are busy.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Farmers kill a lynx instead of the real marauder, a sheep-killing dog.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Timmy gets his Mother's Day present mixed up with a friend's.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Lassie and Timmy buy time for his father to find a lost monument.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Timmy befriends a skunk.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Timmy is stranded.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Timmy has a hard time trying to handle a hawk and its two babies.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Timmy accidentally lets a tiger escape.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Lassie risks her life to stop a marauding bear.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Timmy tries to save a condemned building for returning swallows.

programme.desc: Timmy and Cully think they've found a sea serpent.

programme.desc: Lassie saves a blind dog.

programme.title: Lassie
programme.desc: Paul is accused of poisoning a neighbor's bull.

programme.desc: Timmy finds a wild stallion and wants it caught unharmed.

programme.desc: A movie star leaves her pet poodle in Lassie's care.

programme.desc: A traveling showman (Red Buttons) hawks a supposedly medicinal powder from India.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: A Blow to the Head
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo, the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate.

programme.title: A Vengeful Streak
programme.desc: Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo of a cable van.

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: Hard Turns Ahead
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business, Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team, or the beginning of its undoing?

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement when they try to hook up to the car a young couple are trying to hook-up in. Next, tempers and Pizza fly when Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah repo a pizza parlor's customer's car. And finally, Sonia and Lou grab a truck from a car graveyard, but soon have to avoid the employee's scratch attacks and deal with the nervous debtor with a suspicious suitcase full of cash.

programme.title: Airplane Arrest
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off. Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Natural Liar
programme.desc: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticide when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor, and when they are in the clear, Froy confronts Ronnie about telling Sonia about the boob purchase and inadvertently reveals the Lambo repo. Next, Carlos and Matt get an offer of stardom from a slick Hollywood agent. And finally, Sonia drags more information from Ronnie and doesn't understand why everyone's going behind her back with Froy's big Lambo repo. Plus, they lose control of a Chevy Impala while repoing from a mace wielding shopper.

programme.title: Hayseed Inferno
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before it's even begun.? Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil.

programme.title: The Big Letdown
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire. It is home to comfort dishes like tafelspitz and goulash, and it also gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes, the wiener schnitzel.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. He learns how to make the local fresh egg pasta used for tortellini, tagliatelle, ravioli and lasagne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits Lisbon on the banks of the River Tagus, a city in love with its seafood and possibly the best custard tarts in the world. The culinary effects of Portugal's historic explorations are still seen in its dishes.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki.

programme.title: United Plates of America
programme.desc: Today we visit Boston, a city known for traditional New England seafood culture. From traditional beverages with a modern twist, a rock'n'roll Mexican restaurant to authentic Cuban cuisine with a Boston twist, we get to taste all that modern Boston has to offer.

programme.title: United Plates of America
programme.desc: Today we discover Beverly Hills, a city known for its hilltop mansions, excessive wealth and fine dining experiences. We catch up with a local on Rodeo drive to get an insight on what it means to live in Beverly Hills. We then dip into a famous actor's favorite meal. Finally we learn how to make our own fine dining experience.

programme.title: United Plates of America
programme.desc: Today we try San Diego's seafood in three uniquely different ways. San Diego's food scene is constantly evolving, shaped by its uniquely geographical location, its fresh seafood, and the people who call it home. We visit the busy Naval Harbour on San Diego Bay, with its views to die for. We then visit a bustling family-owned taco truck, known for its fish tacos and ceviche. Finally, we dive into the kitchen with award-winning chef Phil Esteban.

programme.title: United Plates of America
programme.desc: Hartford Connecticut, a town with so many great restaurants to choose from. We try three distinctly different restaurants in the surging west Hartford food scene. Expect all the trimmings New England has to offer…the cozy town setting, the quaint architecture and green public landscapes. This part of America has Gary's heart…and taste buds too!

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Rosemary's family doesn't want her anywhere near the kitchen. Her cooking is awful, but even worse, she's set not one, but two, kitchen fires. Christine decides Rosemary's first challenge is to learn how to fight fires — from real firefighters. Later, Rosemary works as a short-order cook and is flabbergasted to learn that her biggest order is cooking for her favourite Elvis impersonator. Later, she has to prepare a traditional meal for her very skeptical family.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: John's a terrible cook. He can't even use the BBQ. Christine decides that it's time for John to be a man and learn how to grill. She shows him how to cook the perfect steak, and then takes him on an Oyster adventure — in hopes that he can prepare a surf and turf meal for his wife and friends. But before he can do that, Christine turns up the pressure and has him grill ribs for hundreds of people at an International Ribfest.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Jessica's idea of cooking is reheating frozen food. It's time for her to learn to cook -- and Christine is on the job. After Christine teaches her to make amazing Jerk Chicken skewers, they head out on an adventure to make handmade empanadas. With Jessica feeling a little more confident, Christine throws her into a huge challenge: prep, grill and serve seafood appetizers to over 200 VIP guests at Boy's Night Out. Later, when Jessica has to cook for her friends and family and the party size suddenly triples, can she take the heat?

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Vik's a doctor who never cooks. He either eats out or relies on his friends to cook for him. Christine decides that it's time this vegetarian doctor learned to cook for himself. She shows him how to make vegetarian staples, teaches him about the importance of herbs and then challenges him to prepare a fabulous dessert on a busy night at a top French restaurant. In the end, can Vik actually pull off a meal that will impress the friends who've been taking care of him for years?

Along the way, firefighter Johnny Bennett shares his journey from fishing to starting a popular fish dip business. The day wraps up with thrilling doubleheader catches and a conservation message, showcasing the importance of sustainable fishing practices.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Hotshot television anchorman Ron Burgundy welcomes upstart reporter Veronica Corningstone into the male-dominated world of 1970s broadcast news -- that is, until the talented female journalist begins to outshine Burgundy on air. Soon he grows jealous, begins a bitter feud with Veronica and eventually makes a vulgar slip on live TV that ruins his career. However, when an outrageous story breaks at the San Diego Zoo, Ron may get a chance to redeem himself.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: Seven years after capturing the heart of co-anchor Veronica Corningstone (Christina Applegate), newsman Ron Burgundy (Will Ferrell) is offered the chance of a lifetime: a spot on the world's first 24-hour global cable news network. Ron quickly assembles his team: Champ Kind (David Koechner), Brian Fantana (Paul Rudd) and Brick Tamland (Steve Carell). Challenged by his tough female boss, a network owner and a popular anchor, Ron and his pals must find their own way to the top of the ratings.

programme.title: A Night at the Roxbury

They exist only to hit on women at discos, though they're routinely unsuccessful until a chance run-in with Richard Grieco (Richard Grieco) gets them inside the swank Roxbury club. Mistaken for high rollers, they meet their dream women, Vivica (Gigi Rice) and Cambi (Elisa Donovan), and resolve to open a club of their own.

programme.title: Zoolander

But, when his rival, Hansel (Owen Wilson), unexpectedly takes the crown, Derek is crushed. He becomes easy prey for fashion designer Jacobim Mugatu (Will Ferrell), who signs Derek to star in his Derelicte fashion show, then brainwashes him to kill Malaysia's prime minister.

programme.title: Chris Cope
programme.desc: Chris Cope, a Florida transplant now living in LA. The city has been good to Chris in just 4 short years he's appeared on Jimmy Kimmel Live, Tosh.O, Laughs on Fox. He's acted in feature films and also appeared on the hit ABC TV Show "Grey's Anatomy".

programme.title: Johnny Beehner
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he's likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago's prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Robert Mac
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Mike Paramore
programme.desc: Mike Paramore is the guy you fight to sit next to in a movie theatre, on a long car ride, or during a boring lecture. His natural ability to infuse everyday situations with energetic, uplifting humor, combined with a natural ability to put you at ease is key to his personal brand of comedy. His smooth delivery and? powerful punchlines make him a force in stand-up comedy, which is very apparent in his debut album "The Things We Tell Ourselves", available now on iTunes and Amazon. Mike has opened for comedians like Damon Wayans, Cash Cab's Ben Baily, Jon Lovitz, and Saturday Night Live's Jay Pharoah.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure
programme.desc: It's dark, it's cold, there is no air to breath and everything is under extreme pressure. George begins his exploration of the deep with a well-preserved shipwreck in the st.lawrence River, then heads west to dive with undersea explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuyyton, and investigate the newly discovered “Black Smoker” deepsea vents. The show climaxes in Curacao, where we dive to 1000 feet aboard Nuyyton's newest submersible.

programme.title: Angry Planet | 2009 Hurricane
programme.desc: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Tornadoes
programme.desc: Ground Zero for host/adventurer George Kourounis‚ stormchasing is Oklahoma City, capital of North America's ´Tornado Alley´. George tracks a building storm that threatens that tough mid-western city, chases a hail storm, fights to get in the middle of a vicious dust-devil and the funky roadside Americana of the American Midwest.

programme.title: Angry Planet | African Hellhole
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena – but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein

But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone. Strawberry and her friends give the Berrykins a crash course in city-sitting.

programme.title: A Boy and His Dogs
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City. What the Berrykins mistook for a monster was really the bunch of cute pups Huck has been trying to get adopted. While Huck's van is being repaired, Strawberry invites Huck and his seven pups to spend the night in the new bedroom above the marketplace, while she bunks in her old bedroom above the café. The next morning, Strawberry discovers that the playful pups have given her bedroom a total makeover –the wrong kind. An embarrassed Huck insists on staying until he can repair the damage.

programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Hide & Go Bentley // T'was the Trek Before Christmas
programme.desc: Rev and Rumble teach Bentley the puppy to play Hide and Seek! At first the pup doesn't get it...but soon Bentley's hiding so well, they can't find him! Can Rumble use Bentley's instincts to help them track down their puppy pal? // A big winter storm is headed for town...and it's Christmas Eve! What if Santa can't find them through the snow? Rev and the kids round up their own toys and deliver them to all the kids in town-just in case! But can they make it through the storm?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Pond Pirates // The Coolest Girl I Know
programme.desc: When Rev's dad tells about him about treasure sunken in the pond, Rev and Avery set out on a pirate adventure! They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! Intent on outdoing Katie, Avery pulls a stunt that she comes to regret.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Fender Bend Friend Day // The Rev & Rumble Fan Club
programme.desc: Rev wants to surprise his friends with a movie celebrating their friendship, so he secretly gathers footage to show they're the best friends ever. When Avery realizes what he's up to, she adds her own clips to the movie - surprising Rev as well! // Owen hosts a virtual review of the gang's adventures with Rev and Rumble, plus all of their awesome gear! He walks his viewers through some of their most memorable moments, from mega stunts to monsters to rescue missions.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Kongsuni and Friends
programme.desc: For five-year-old Kongsuni life is one big adventure.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met
programme.desc: Everyday Henry meets something new - The day Henry met a Whale! The day Henry met the Moon!, The day Henry met a Car! How exciting, I wonder what Henry's going to meet today?

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Ted the Train - Let's harvest the colourful veggies!: It's harvest time! Let's help Ted gather as many delicious, healthy, and colourful veggies as we can find in the allotment!

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Ted the Train - Let's make colourful slushies!: Slushies are so yummy! Let's make some with Ted and learn what colours the different flavours come in!

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: The Construction Squad builds Car City brick by brick! They're proof that everything's possible with a little help from our friends.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Let the babies drift off into a magical slumber with Hush Little Baby, Hey Diddle Diddle and more!

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Introduce kids to a musical journey to slumber with Are You Sleeping, Hush Little Baby and more!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Relaxing melodies to help children wind down and drift off to sleep peacefully.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: A satisfying compilation of underwater art like Submarine and Seahorse along with a dreamy touch of a Shooting Star and many more.

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Chiki Art Soothing's this episode features satisfying artworks like Glitter Fish and Shooting Star.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: The best of the fun nursery rhymes are here. Five Little Monkeys Song, Ten in the bed & more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Let's charm the little ones with our peppy Teacher song, The Shark Song, Mr Sun and many more!

programme.title: Non Stop Hits
programme.desc: Fill the day with music and fun with Ice-cream Song, Clap Your Hands, Johny Johny Yes Papa and more!

programme.title: Back to Classics
programme.desc: Every kids loves Head Shoulders Knees and Toes, Old MacDonlad had a Farm & all the nursery rhymes.

programme.desc: ducktv favorites are the most popular ducktv shows, representing different educational values. Just to name a few, the series Mimo and Bobo develops social skills, Fireteam fosters problem- solving, while Shaping Up promotes shape and color identification.

programme.desc: The learn with ducktv section presents ducktv shows with a strong educational aspect. The episodes of this category teach first concepts, music and art, stimulate imagination and creativity, and develop cognitive skills.

programme.title: Let's Move!
programme.desc: ducktv's let's move! episodes are all about sports, physical exercises and outdoor adventures. This section promotes movement and motor skills, develops basic coordination and a sense of rhythm through exercising.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: Four curious young dinosaurs named Rocky, Bill, Tiny, and Mazu go on adventures while following their herd. Rocky is the courageous one, Bill is the most timid, Tiny is the smallest yet most playful, and Mazu is the most inquisitive. The four friends look at things such as mapping the stars and searching for flowers but most importantly, they are asserting their independence and learning to do things away from the safety of the herd.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Bessie We Hardly Knew Ye: Vik's quest to find Bessie the lake monster teaches everyone that just because you can't see something doesn't mean it isn't real.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - The Magic Ring: A trip to meet Mr. Arnold's friends Penn and Teller leads to a magical mystery that only the Super K's can solve: what happened to Houdini's Ring?

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Piggies From The Deep & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Piggies From The Deep", "Oh Gnome!" and more!

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Chucked Out, Bomb's Awake & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Chucked Out", "Bomb's Awake" and more!

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - To Shark or Not to Shark: Dr. Piranoid turns the Sharks human again as part of a plot to make the transformation permanent.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Eco Shark: Investigating whale attacks, the Sharks and Moby Lick uncover Malcolm Medusa III's secret polluted sanctuary, hidden by holograms.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Roadsterball / Blond is Back!: Klaus' longtime nemesis, Niccolo Tessio, challenges the Paq to a game of Roadsterball. Team leader Klaus only chooses the fastest and strongest of the Paq to help, but it doesn't go the way he planned. Klaus must figure out a way to utilize all of the strengths of the Paq members or they'll loose the game. / Shaq has a big surprise for Fleming. He's invited the actor who played James Blond, Ian Connery, to come visit. Ian always wished they could have gone on a real mission together and Fleming feels the same way.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Close Encounters of the Bad Kind / Gold Fever!: Dawkins and Himari are driving back to the garage at night and he is pointing out different stars to her and she is bored. Dawkins sees a strange star that he's never seen before. Then, the star moves across the sky and crashes in the distance. An alien captures them, intending to take them back to his planet as spare parts and they must find a way to escape before the ship takes off. / Boone tells The Paq about the story of The Lost Scotchman's Mine, a legendary treasure buried deep in the hills or Orlanta. Is it a myth or real? Fleming, Gronk, and Himari all decide to find out.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Big Hike / Back to the Jurassic: Nine kids from the Boys & Girls Club go on a nature hike with Boone, Fleming, and Gronk. Gronk tries to follow Shaq's rule of staying on the trail, but one of his adventurous kids convinces him to go explore. When they get lost, they have to find their way back to the trail before nightfall. / Dawkins invites Biggie D, Fleming, and Himari to a viewing of a rare daylight lunar eclipse out in the wilderness. When a mysterious fog appears and transports them back to the Jurassic Era, the Paq must find their way back a fast as possible. What they didn't plan on was an extra passenger back to the present: a baby T-Rex!

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Belly of the Beast: The Skylanders and the cadets come together to fight the evil Fire Viper.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Who's Your Daddy?: One of Jet-Vac's eggs hatches, producing an evil baby greeble.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Sheep(ball) Dreams: When Dreamcatcher gets amnesia, the Skylanders bring her back to the Academy in the hopes of reforming her.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Reign Storm: Princess Toadstool and Toad go to Hawaii for a vacation while leaving the Mario Bros. in charge of the Mushroom Kingdom. / King Koopa and Kooky plan to go to the place where the Mario Bros. have gone into the Mushroom Kingdom by using a time travel device.

programme.desc: The Power Rangers work to restore Zordon and Alpha, unaware of the evil Green Ranger.

programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.
